sec1.title: 6.1 Are Plants and Animals Made of Same Tissues?
sec1.content: A tissue is a group of cells that are similar in structure and/or work together to achieve a particular function. Plants and animals are made of different tissues. Plant tissues are categorized into Meristematic (dividing) and Permanent tissues. Animal tissues are Epithelial, Connective, Muscular, and Nervous tissues. Muscular tissue is responsible for movement in our body.
